input.coordinate_frame: raw sampled camera frames; no reconstructed world frame; meters where pose text is present

raw_links.name: sampled_frames_ablation
raw_links.description: ABLATION/CONTROL ONLY: index of raw sampled frames + pose/time text the VLM reads at query time. This is not exported spatial memory; it must never feed a fixed Track 1/2 object-memory API.

build.peak_ram_unavailable_reason: no memory is built for a raw-frame control
build.peak_vram_unavailable_reason: no memory is built for a raw-frame control

notes: No-explicit-memory control: a VLM answers from raw sampled frames + pose/time text (ReMEmbR VLMNonAgent path), with no object inventory, no 3D object positions, and no object-location query API. explicit_memory=false; raw frames are an ablation/control input only and never enter the Track 1/2 fixed object-memory API table. Track 1/2/3/4 fixed APIs are invalid by design; this control is compared agentic/control-only.
